I see "Lunch with Sarah" on 2024-05-15 from 12:30 to 13:30 (Central Park Cafe).

If you mean the free time between your previous meeting (Team Sync ends 11:00) and the lunch start (12:30), you have 01:30.

If you meant "time remaining until lunch from now," do you want me to calculate from the current time? If so, tell me the current time (HH:MM) or confirm I should use your device/system time.
